summary: Dashboard audit completed. All reported issues have been fixed: 1) Pet photo displays correctly with fallback, 2) Pet Soul scores are consistent (100% for Mojo shown in hero, gamification banner, and navbar), 3) All 14 pillars visible on dashboard with correct paths, 4) 'More' dropdown shows Adopt/Farewell/Shop, 5) Footer includes all pillar links including Adopt/Farewell/Shop

details: All 14 pillars displayed: Feed, Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Fit, Enjoy, Learn, Advisory, Adopt, Farewell, Shop, Emergency
Pillar icons clickable and navigate correctly (tested Adopt -> /adopt)
Mojo's photo displays correctly in dashboard hero section
Pet Pass number TDC-T4UY18 displayed on photo
Fallback emoji (🐕) shown for pets without photos
Luna also shows 100% score in API
More dropdown contains: Fit, Learn, Advisory, Paperwork, Emergency, Adopt, Farewell, Shop
